react-markdown 迁移计划

 目标

 将 Markdown 渲染从 @innei/markdown-to-jsx-yet 迁移到 react-markdown + 自定义 remark 插件。

 前置依赖

 需要先安装的包：
 pnpm add react-markdown remark-gfm remark-math rehype-katex rehype-raw
 pnpm add -D @types/mdast @types/hast micromark-util-types micromark-util-symbol micromark-util-character

 ---
 执行步骤

 Step 1: 创建 remark-shiroi 包

 操作: 创建 packages/remark-shiroi/ 目录结构

 packages/remark-shiroi/
 ├── package.json
 ├── tsconfig.json
 └── src/
     └── index.ts

 package.json 内容:
 {
   "name": "@shiro/remark",
   "version": "0.0.1",
   "type": "module",
   "private": true,
   "exports": {
     ".": "./src/index.ts"
   },
   "dependencies": {
     "micromark-util-types": "^2.0.0",
     "micromark-util-symbol": "^2.0.0",
     "micromark-util-character": "^2.0.0"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@types/mdast": "^4.0.0"
   }
 }

 验证: pnpm install 成功

 Step 2: 实现 remark-spoiler

 依赖: Step 1 完成

 创建文件:

 1. src/micromark-spoiler/syntax.ts - tokenizer，Hook 到 | 字符 (code 124)
   - 状态机: start → marker1 → marker2 → content → closeMarker1 → closeMarker2
   - 发射 tokens: spoiler, spoilerMarker, spoilerContent
 2. src/mdast-spoiler/from-markdown.ts
   - enter handler: 创建 { type: 'spoiler', children: [] } 节点
   - exit handler: 退出节点
 3. src/mdast-spoiler/to-markdown.ts
   - handler: 将 spoiler 节点序列化为 ||content||
 4. src/remark-spoiler.ts - 插件入口
   - 注册 micromarkExtensions
   - 注册 fromMarkdownExtensions
   - 注册 toMarkdownExtensions

 验证: 编写测试用例确认 ||test|| 能解析为 spoiler 节点

 ---
 Step 3: 实现 remark-ins

 依赖: Step 2 完成 (复用模式)

 创建文件: 与 spoiler 结构相同，将 || 替换为 ++

 1. src/micromark-ins/syntax.ts - Hook 到 + 字符 (code 43)
 2. src/mdast-ins/from-markdown.ts
 3. src/mdast-ins/to-markdown.ts
 4. src/remark-ins.ts

 验证: ++test++ 能解析为 ins 节点

 ---
 Step 4: 实现 remark-mention

 依赖: Step 1 完成

 语法规则:
 - 完整形式: [DisplayName]{GH@username}
 - 简写形式: {GH@username}
 - 支持前缀: GH, TW, TG

 创建文件:

 1. src/micromark-mention/syntax.ts
   - Hook 到 [ (code 91) 和 { (code 123)
   - 状态机需处理可选的 displayName 部分
   - 发射 tokens: mention, mentionDisplayName, mentionPrefix, mentionName
 2. src/mdast-mention/from-markdown.ts
   - 创建节点: { type: 'mention', prefix: string, name: string, displayName?: string }
 3. src/mdast-mention/to-markdown.ts
   - 序列化为 [displayName]{prefix@name} 或 {prefix@name}
 4. src/remark-mention.ts

 验证:
 - {GH@Innei} → { type: 'mention', prefix: 'GH', name: 'Innei' }
 - [Name]{TW@user} → { type: 'mention', prefix: 'TW', name: 'user', displayName: 'Name' }

 ---
 Step 5: 实现 remark-container

 依赖: Step 1 完成

 语法规则:
 ::: type {params}
 content
 :::

 支持的 type: gallery, carousel, banner, warn, error, danger, info, success, warning, note, grid, masonry

 创建文件:

 1. src/micromark-container/syntax.ts
   - Hook 到 : (code 58)，需要 block 模式
   - 状态机:
       - 检测 ::: 开始
     - 跳过空格
     - 解析 type
     - 可选解析 {params}
     - 收集 content 直到遇到 :::
   - 发射 tokens: container, containerFence, containerType, containerParams, containerContent
 2. src/mdast-container/from-markdown.ts
   - 创建节点: { type: 'container', containerType: string, params?: string, children: [] }
   - content 需要递归解析为 children
 3. src/mdast-container/to-markdown.ts
   - 序列化回 ::: type {params}\n...\n:::
 4. src/remark-container.ts

 验证:
 ::: warn
 Warning message
 :::
 应解析为 { type: 'container', containerType: 'warn', children: [...] }

          ...extendsRules,
        },
        ...rest,
      })

      return mdElement
    }, [
      value,
      props.children,
      allowsScript,
      overrides,
      extendsRules,
      renderers,
      rest,
      MHeader,
    ])

    if (removeWrapper) return <Suspense>{node}</Suspense>

    return (
      <ErrorBoundary>
        <Suspense>
          <As
            style={style}
            {...wrapperProps}
            ref={ref}
            className={clsx(
              'markdown',
              codeBlockFully ? 'markdown--code-fully' : undefined,
              variant !== 'post' && `markdown--${variant}`,
              className,
            )}
          >
            {node}
          </As>
        </Suspense>
      </ErrorBoundary>
    )
  })
Markdown.displayName = 'Markdown'

export const MainMarkdown: FC<
  MdProps & MarkdownToJSX.Options & PropsWithChildren
> = (props) => {
  const { wrapperProps = noopObj } = props
  return (
    <Markdown
      as="main"
      {...props}
      wrapperProps={useMemo(
        () => ({
          ...wrapperProps,
          id: MAIN_MARKDOWN_ID,
        }),
        [wrapperProps],
      )}
    />
  )
}

// not complete, but probably good enough
function slugify(str: string) {
  return (
    str
      .replaceAll(/[ÀÁÂÃÄÅæ]/gi, 'a')
      .replaceAll(/ç/gi, 'c')
      .replaceAll(/ð/gi, 'd')
      .replaceAll(/[ÈÉÊË]/gi, 'e')
      .replaceAll(/[ÏÎÍÌ]/gi, 'i')
      .replaceAll(/Ñ/gi, 'n')
      .replaceAll(/[øœÕÔÓÒ]/gi, 'o')
      .replaceAll(/[ÜÛÚÙ]/gi, 'u')
      .replaceAll(/[ŸÝ]/gi, 'y')
      // remove non-chinese, non-latin, non-number, non-space
      .replaceAll(
        /[^\u4E00-\u9FFF\u3040-\u309F\u30A0-\u30FF\uAC00-\uD7AFa-z0-9- ]/gi,
        '',
      )
      .replaceAll(' ', '-')
      .toLowerCase()
  )
}

const listRule: Partial<
  MarkdownToJSX.Rule<
    MarkdownToJSX.OrderedListNode | MarkdownToJSX.UnorderedListNode
  >
> = {
  render(node, output, state) {
    const Tag = node.ordered ? 'ol' : 'ul'

    return (
      <Tag
        key={state?.key}
        start={node.type === RuleType.orderedList ? node.start : undefined}
      >
        {node.items.map((item: any, i: number) => {
          let className = ''
          if (item[0]?.type === 'gfmTask') {
            className = 'list-none flex items-center'
          }

          return (
            <li className={className} key={i}>
              {output(item, state!)}
            </li>
          )
        })}
      </Tag>
    )
  },
}

import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
import { Priority } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
import * as React from 'react'

import { SocialSourceLink } from '../../rich-link/SocialSourceLink'
import { allowInline } from '../utils/parser'

// [Innei]{GH@Innei} {TW@Innei} {TG@Innei}
export const MentionRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
  content: Record<string, string>
}> = {
  match: allowInline((source) => {
    return /^(\[(?<displayName>.*?)\])?\{((?<prefix>(GH)|(TW)|(TG))@(?<name>\w+\b))\}\s?(?!\[.*?\])/.exec(
      source,
    )
  }),
  order: Priority.LOW,
  parse(capture) {
    const { groups } = capture

    if (!groups) {
      return {
        content: {},
      }
    }
    return {
      content: { ...groups },
    }
  },
  render(result, _, state) {
    const { content } = result
    if (!content) {
      return null as any
    }

    const { prefix, name, displayName } = content
    if (!name) {
      return null as any
    }

    return (
      <SocialSourceLink
        name={displayName || name}
        source={prefix}
        key={state?.key}
      />
    )
  },
}

import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
import { Priority } from 'markdown-to-jsx'

import { Spoiler } from '../renderers/spoiler'
import { parseCaptureInline, simpleInlineRegex } from '../utils/parser'

const INLINE_SKIP_R =
  '((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|\\|\\|.*?\\|\\||[\\s\\S])+?)'

// ||Spoiler||
export const SpoilerRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
  children: MarkdownToJSX.ParserResult[]
}> = {
  match: simpleInlineRegex(new RegExp(`^(\\|\\|)${INLINE_SKIP_R}\\1`)),
  order: Priority.LOW,
  parse: parseCaptureInline,
  render(node, output, state?) {
    return <Spoiler key={state?.key}>{output(node.children, state!)}</Spoiler>
  },
}

  'error',
  'danger',

export const ContainerRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
  node: {
    type: string

  match: (source: string) => {
    const result =
      /^\s*::: *(?<type>.*?) *(?:\{(?<params>.*?)\} *)?\n(?<content>[\s\S]+?)\s*::: *(?:\n *)+/.exec(
        source,
      )

    if (!result) return null

    const { type } = result.groups!
    if (!type || !type.match(shouldCatchContainerName)) return null
    return result
  },
  order: Priority.MED,
  parse(capture) {
    const { groups } = capture
    return {
      node: { ...groups } as any,
    }

      case 'error':
      case 'danger':
      case 'info':
      case 'note':
      case 'success':

        const transformMap = {
          warning: 'warn',
          danger: 'error',
          note: 'info',

import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'

function parseInline(
  parse: MarkdownToJSX.NestedParser,
  children: string,
  state: MarkdownToJSX.State,
): MarkdownToJSX.ParserResult[] {
  const isCurrentlyInline = state.inline || false
  const isCurrentlySimple = state.simple || false
  state.inline = true
  state.simple = true
  const result = parse(children, state)
  state.inline = isCurrentlyInline
  state.simple = isCurrentlySimple
  return result
}

export const parseCaptureInline: MarkdownToJSX.Parser<{
  children: MarkdownToJSX.ParserResult[]
}> = (capture, parse, state: MarkdownToJSX.State = {}) => {
  return {
    children: parseInline(parse, capture[2], state),
  }
}

export function simpleInlineRegex(regex: RegExp) {
  return allowInline(function match(
    source: string,
    state: MarkdownToJSX.State,
  ) {
    if (state.inline || state.simple) {
      return regex.exec(source)
    } else {
      return null
    }
  })
}

export function blockRegex(regex: RegExp) {
  return function match(source: string, state: MarkdownToJSX.State) {
    if (state.inline || state.simple) {
      return null
    } else {
      return regex.exec(source)
    }
  }
}

export function allowInline<T extends Function & { inline?: 0 | 1 }>(fn: T) {
  fn.inline = 1

  return fn
}
```

export const BlockLinkRenderer = ({
  href,
  children,
  fallback,
  accessory,
}: PropsWithChildren<{
  href: string
  fallback?: ReactNode
  accessory?: ReactNode
}>) => {
  const url = useMemo(() => {
    try {
      return new URL(href)
    } catch {
      return null
    }
  }, [href])

  const fallbackElement = useMemo(
    () =>
      fallback ?? (
        <p>
          <MarkdownLink href={href}>
            {children ?? <span>{href}</span>}
          </MarkdownLink>
        </p>
      ),
    [children, fallback, href],
  )

  const { matchUrl } = usePluginMatcher()

  const Inner = useMemo(() => {
    if (!url) return null

    // First, try to match with ShadowLinkCard plugins
    const pluginMatch = matchUrl(url)
    if (pluginMatch) {
      return (
        <LinkCard
          fallbackUrl={pluginMatch.match.fullUrl || url.toString()}
          source={pluginMatch.plugin.name}
          id={pluginMatch.match.id}
        />
      )
    }

    // Handle non-ShadowLinkCard embeds (iframes, tweets, etc.)
    switch (true) {
      case isGithubUrl(url): {
        return (
          <GithubUrlRenderL
            url={url}
            href={href}
            fallbackElement={fallbackElement}
          />
        )
      }

      case isTweetUrl(url): {
        const id = getTweetId(url)
        return (
          <Suspense>
            <Tweet id={id} />
          </Suspense>
        )
      }

      case isYoutubeUrl(url): {
        const id = url.searchParams.get('v')!
        return (
          <FixedRatioContainer>
            <iframe
              src={`https://www.youtube.com/embed/${id}`}
              className="absolute inset-0 size-full border-0"
              allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
              allowFullScreen
              title="YouTube video player"
            />
          </FixedRatioContainer>
        )
      }

      case isCodesandboxUrl(url): {
        return (
          <FixedRatioContainer>
            <iframe
              className="absolute inset-0 size-full rounded-md border-0"
              src={`https://codesandbox.io/embed/${url.pathname.slice(
                2,
              )}?fontsize=14&hidenavigation=1&theme=dark${url.search}`}
            />
          </FixedRatioContainer>
        )
      }

      case isSelfThinkingUrl(url): {
        const id = url.pathname.split('/').pop()!
        return <ThinkingLinkRenderer id={id} />
      }

      case isBilibiliVideoUrl(url): {
        const { id } = parseBilibiliVideoUrl(url)
        return (
          <div className="w-screen max-w-full">
            <FixedRatioContainer>
              <ClientOnly
                fallback={
                  <BlockLoading className="absolute inset-0 size-full rounded-md">
                    哔哩哔哩视频加载中...
                  </BlockLoading>
                }
              >
                <iframe
                  src={`//player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=${id}&autoplay=0`}
                  scrolling="no"
                  frameBorder="no"
                  className="absolute inset-0 size-full rounded-md border-0"
                  allowFullScreen
                />
              </ClientOnly>
            </FixedRatioContainer>
          </div>
        )
      }
    }

    return null
  }, [fallbackElement, href, matchUrl, url])

  if (!url) {
    return fallbackElement
  }

  if (Inner) {
    return (
      <>
        {Inner}
        {accessory}
      </>
    )
  }
  return fallbackElement
}

'use client'

import 'katex/dist/katex.min.css'

import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
import { Priority } from 'markdown-to-jsx'

import { KateX } from '../../katex'
import { blockRegex, simpleInlineRegex } from '../utils/parser'

const INLINE_SKIP_R =
  '((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|[\\s\\S])+?)'

//  $ c = \pm\sqrt{a^2 + b^2} $
export const KateXRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
  katex: string
}> = {
  match: simpleInlineRegex(new RegExp(`^(\\$)(${INLINE_SKIP_R})\\1`)),
  order: Priority.LOW,
  parse(capture) {
    return {
      type: 'kateX',
      katex: capture[2],
    }
  },
  render(node, output, state) {
    return <KateX key={state?.key}>{node.katex}</KateX>
  },
}
export const KateXBlockRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
  groups: Record<string, string> | undefined
}> = {
  match: blockRegex(
    new RegExp(`^\\s*\\$\\$ *(?<content>[\\s\\S]+?)\\s*\\$\\$ *(?:\n *)+\n?`),
  ),

  order: Priority.MED,
  parse(capture) {
    return {
      type: 'kateXBlock',
      groups: capture.groups,
    }
  },
  render(node, _, state?) {
    if (!node.groups) {
      return null
    }
    return (
      <div className="scrollbar-none overflow-auto" key={state?.key}>
        <KateX mode="display">{node.groups?.content}</KateX>
      </div>
    )
  },
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { SayModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
import Markdown from 'markdown-to-jsx'
import { m } from 'motion/react'
import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
import { memo, useMemo } from 'react'
import Masonry from 'react-responsive-masonry'

import { useIsLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
import { LoadMoreIndicator } from '~/components/modules/shared/LoadMoreIndicator'
import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
import {
  BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView,
  BottomToUpTransitionView,
} from '~/components/ui/transition'
import { useIsDark } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-dark'
import { addAlphaToHSL, getColorScheme, stringToHue } from '~/lib/color'
import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'

import { useSayListQuery, useSayModal } from './hooks'

export const SayMasonry = () => {
  const { fetchNextPage, hasNextPage, data } = useSayListQuery()

  const isMobile = useIsMobile()

  if (!data) return null

  const list = data.pages
    .flatMap((page) => page.data)
    .map((say) => ({
      text: say.text,
      item: say,
      id: say.id,
    }))

  return (
    <>
      <Masonry gutter="1rem" columnsCount={isMobile ? 1 : 2}>
        {list.map((item, index) => (
          <Item key={item.id} item={item.item} index={index} />
        ))}
      </Masonry>
      {hasNextPage && (
        <LoadMoreIndicator onLoading={fetchNextPage} className="mt-12">
          <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
            <Masonry columnsCount={isMobile ? 1 : 2}>
              {placeholderData.map((item) => (
                <SaySkeleton key={item.id} />
              ))}
            </Masonry>
          </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
        </LoadMoreIndicator>
      )}
    </>
  )
}

const placeholderData = Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, index) => ({
  index,
  text: '',
  id: index.toFixed(0),
  item: {} as SayModel,
}))
const SaySkeleton = memo(() => (
  <div className="relative border-l-[3px] border-l-slate-500 bg-slate-200/50 px-4 py-3 dark:bg-neutral-800">
    <div className="mb-2 h-6 w-full rounded bg-slate-300/80 dark:bg-neutral-700" />
    <div className="flex text-sm text-base-content/60 md:justify-between">
      <div className="mb-2 h-4 w-14 rounded bg-slate-300/80 dark:bg-neutral-700 md:mb-0" />
      <div className="ml-auto text-right">
        <div className="h-4 w-1/4 rounded bg-slate-300/80 dark:bg-neutral-700" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
))
SaySkeleton.displayName = 'SaySkeleton'

const options = {
  disableParsingRawHTML: true,
  forceBlock: true,
} satisfies MarkdownToJSX.Options

const Item = memo<{
  item: SayModel
  index: number
}>(({ item: say, index: i }) => {
  const t = useTranslations('says')
  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
  const hasSource = !!say.source
  const hasAuthor = !!say.author
  // const color = colorsMap.get(say.id)
  const { dark: darkColors, light: lightColors } = useMemo(
    () => getColorScheme(stringToHue(say.id)),
    [say.id],
  )
  const isDark = useIsDark()

  const isLogged = useIsLogged()
  const present = useSayModal()

  return (
    <BottomToUpTransitionView className="w-full" delay={i * 50} key={say.id}>
      <m.blockquote
        layout
        key={say.id}
        className="group relative border-l-[3px] px-4 py-3"
        style={{
          borderLeftColor: isDark ? darkColors.accent : lightColors.accent,
          backgroundColor: addAlphaToHSL(
            isDark ? darkColors.background : lightColors.background,
            0.15,
          ),
        }}
      >
        <Markdown className="mb-2" options={options}>{`${say.text}`}</Markdown>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap text-sm text-base-content/60 md:justify-between">
          <div className="mb-2 w-full md:mb-0 md:w-auto">
            <span className="mr-2">{tCommon('published_at')}</span>
            <RelativeTime date={say.created} />
          </div>
          <div className="w-full text-right md:ml-auto md:w-auto">
            <div>
              {hasSource && `出自“${say.source}”`}
              {hasSource && hasAuthor && ', '}
              {hasAuthor && t('author_label', { author: say.author! })}
              {!hasAuthor && !hasSource && t('owner_says')}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        {isLogged && (
          <button
            onClick={() => present(say)}
            className={clsxm(
              'absolute right-0 top-0 -translate-y-1/3 translate-x-1/3 bg-base-100',
              'center flex size-6 rounded-full text-accent opacity-0 ring-1 ring-slate-200 duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 dark:ring-neutral-800',
            )}
          >
            <i className="i-mingcute-quill-pen-line" />
            <span className="sr-only">编辑</span>
          </button>
        )}

export const NoteHeaderDate = withClientOnly(() => {
  const date = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => ({
    created: data?.data.created,
    modified: data?.data.modified,
  }))
  const format = useFormatter()
  const t = useTranslations('common')

  if (!date?.created) return null

  const tips = date.modified
    ? t('modified_at', {
        date: format.dateTime(new Date(date.modified), {
          year: 'numeric',
          month: 'long',
          day: 'numeric',
          weekday: 'long',
        }),
      })
    : ''

  return (
    <FloatPopover
      sheet={{
        triggerAsChild: false,
      }}
      as="span"
      mobileAsSheet
      type="tooltip"
      TriggerComponent={NoteDateMeta}
    >
      {tips}
    </FloatPopover>
  )
})
export const NoteMarkdown = () => {
  const text = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.text)!

  return (
    <MainMarkdown
      className="mt-10"
      allowsScript
      renderers={MarkdownRenderers}
      variant="note"
      value={text}
    />
  )
}
export const NoteMarkdownImageRecordProvider = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
  const images = useCurrentNoteDataSelector(
    (data) => data?.data.images || (noopArr as Image[]),
  )!

  return (
    <MarkdownImageRecordProvider images={images}>
      {props.children}
    </MarkdownImageRecordProvider>
  )
}
const MarkdownRenderers: Partial<MarkdownToJSX.PartialRules> = {
  [RuleType.text]: {
    render(node: MarkdownToJSX.TextNode, _: any, state?: MarkdownToJSX.State) {
      return <span key={state?.key}>{node.text}</span>
    },
  },
}
export const IndentArticleContainer = (props: PropsWithChildren) => (
  <article className="prose relative">{props.children}</article>
)

export const NoteDataReValidate: FC<{ fetchedAt: string }> = withClientOnly(
  ({ fetchedAt }) => {
    const isOutdated = useMemo(
      () =>
        Date.now() - new Date(fetchedAt).getTime() > appStaticConfig.revalidate,
      [fetchedAt],
    )

    const dataSetter = useSetCurrentNoteData()
    const locale = useLocale()

    const nid = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((note) => {
      if (!note) return {}
      return note.data.nid
    })
    const onceRef = useRef(false)
    const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    useEffect(() => {
      if (onceRef.current) return
      onceRef.current = true
      if (!isOutdated) return

      if (!nid) return

      queryClient
        .fetchQuery(queries.note.byNid(nid.toString(), null, locale))
        .then((data) => {
          dataSetter(data as NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload)
          // toast.info('此文章访问的内容已过期，所以页面数据自动更新了。')
          logger.log('Note data revalidated', data)
        })
    }, [dataSetter, isOutdated, locale, nid, queryClient])
    return null
  },
)

import type { FC } from 'react'

import { Markdown, RuleType } from '~/components/ui/markdown'
import { useTypeScriptHappyCallback } from '~/hooks/common/use-callback'

import { useCommentMarkdownContainerRefSetter } from './CommentProvider'

const disabledTypes = [
  RuleType.footnote,
  RuleType.footnoteReference,
  RuleType.htmlComment,
  RuleType.htmlSelfClosing,
  RuleType.htmlBlock,
]

export const CommentMarkdown: FC<{
  children: string
}> = ({ children }) => {
  const setContainerRef = useCommentMarkdownContainerRefSetter()

  return (
    <div
      className="contents"
      ref={useTypeScriptHappyCallback(
        (ref) => setContainerRef(ref?.firstChild as HTMLDivElement),
        [setContainerRef],
      )}
    >
      <Markdown
        variant="comment"
        disabledTypes={disabledTypes}
        disableParsingRawHTML
        forceBlock
        value={children}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

**Detailing Markdown migration blockers and risks**

Reviewed complex Markdown features and found several blockers: custom nodes need remark-rehype handlers absent from the plan (see Markdown.tsx), footnote rendering depends on markdown-to-jsx data structures requiring a replacement plugin to avoid breaking link cards, and ReactMarkdown’s use of rehype-raw without sanitize poses XSS risks missing in the plan. Other high risks include missing support for custom GFM extensions like textMarked and code block attributes, potential conflicts in spoiler tokenization affecting tables, and unaddressed container logic for gallery/grid/masonry features. Medium-level issues include missing handling of heading slug IDs, allowed element filtering, and raw HTML/custom components lowercasing in rehype-raw. Dependency updates and CSS imports for math rendering are also overlooked. Next steps should focus on adding necessary remark-rehype plugins, sanitization, and matching existing component mappings for safe, compatible rendering.

**Findings**
- Blocker: 计划只迁移了 `Markdown.tsx` 和 RSS，但还有多个直接依赖 `markdown-to-jsx` 的组件未覆盖，移除依赖会直接编译失败或功能缺失：`src/components/modules/note/NoteTopicMarkdownRender.tsx:3-26`、`src/components/modules/say/SayMasonry.tsx:3-118`、`src/components/modules/comment/CommentMarkdown.tsx:1-34`、`src/app/[locale]/notes/[id]/pageExtra.tsx:130-170`、`src/app/feed/route.tsx:1-210`。
- Blocker: `react-markdown` 的 `components` 只能接 HAST 标签；你计划在 `components` 里直接渲染 `spoiler/mention/container`，但如果 remark 插件输出的是 mdast 自定义节点，会被 `remark-rehype` 丢掉。需要在 `remark-rehype` 加 handlers 或把自定义节点转成具体标签，否则这些节点不会渲染。
- Blocker: 现有脚注渲染依赖 `footnoteMap` 和 `node.alert` 等 `markdown-to-jsx` AST 字段；`react-markdown` 并不会提供这些字段，`src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx:217-275` 这段逻辑会直接失效，需要新的 remark/rehype 管道来重建脚注数据。
- High: 计划加入 `rehype-raw` 但未加入任何 sanitize，会引入 XSS（当前代码通过 `disableParsingRawHTML`/`sanitizer` 控制）。尤其 `CommentMarkdown` 明确禁止原始 HTML。需要 `rehype-sanitize` 或 `ReactMarkdown` 的 `urlTransform` + 条件启用 `rehype-raw`（仅 `allowsScript` 时），否则安全性会回退。相关文件：`src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx`、`src/components/modules/comment/CommentMarkdown.tsx`、`src/components/modules/ai/Summary.tsx`。
- High: 当前实现支持 `textMarked`（==高亮==）、代码块 attrs（`node.rawAttrs`）、以及自定义 blockquote alert；`remark-gfm` 并不提供这些。迁移后会丢特性或行为改变。相关位置：`src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx:159-214`、`src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx:276-287`。
- High: `||spoiler||` 用 micromark 扩展挂在 `|`，与 GFM 表格使用的 `|` 有冲突风险；如果不仔细处理优先级/切分，表格可能被破坏。现有 `markdown-to-jsx` 只在 inline 生效。新插件需要明确隔离。
- High: `container` 目前不仅解析 `:::`, 还做了复杂渲染（banner/gallery/grid/masonry + 二次 Markdown 解析 + 图片提取）。计划只说“递归解析 children”，但没有说明如何传递 `params`、如何重用 `pickImagesFromMarkdown` 和 `GridMarkdownImage` 这套逻辑。相关文件：`src/components/ui/markdown/parsers/container.tsx`。
- Medium: 计划里 `Markdown.tsx` 的 `components` 映射太少。现有实现覆盖了 `p/table/thead/tbody/tr/td/th/footer/details/img/tag/Tabs/Tab/Video/LinkCard/Gallery/script` 等，迁移后若不保留，会直接回退渲染。相关位置：`src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx:119-147`。
- Medium: 标题 `slugify` 是自定义逻辑（含中文等），`react-markdown` 不会自动加 id；TOC / 锚点会变。需要 `remark-slug` 或自定义 plugin 以保持一致。相关位置：`src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx:114-156`。
- Medium: `NoteTopicMarkdownRender` 依赖 `allowedTypes/forceBlock/wrapper` 限制渲染范围；迁移后需要对应到 `allowedElements/unwrapDisallowed` 等，否则展示范围会扩大。相关位置：`src/components/modules/note/NoteTopicMarkdownRender.tsx:7-26`。

- Medium: 新包 `@shiro/remark` 在当前仓库结构里需要 `link:` 依赖写入根 `package.json`，否则 `@shiro/remark` 无法解析；并且实现 micromark/remark 扩展通常还需要 `mdast-util-from-markdown` 等运行时依赖，你的依赖列表里没有这些。相关位置：`package.json`、`packages/remark-shiroi/package.json`（计划新增）。

_**User (2026-01-30 17:13:58Z)**_

我更新了 plan: 关键技术决策

 1. MDAST → HAST 转换策略

 问题: react-markdown 的 components 只接受 HAST 标签，自定义 mdast 节点会被 remark-rehype 丢弃。

 解决方案: 每个自定义 remark 插件必须配套一个 remarkToRehype handler，将 mdast 节点转为 hast 节点：

 // 在 remark-spoiler 中
 export const spoilerHandler: Handler = (state, node) => {
   return {
     type: 'element',
     tagName: 'span',
     properties: { 'data-spoiler': true, className: ['spoiler'] },
     children: state.all(node)
   }
 }

 // 使用时
 <ReactMarkdown
   remarkRehypeOptions={{
     handlers: {
       spoiler: spoilerHandler,
       mention: mentionHandler,
       ins: insHandler,
       container: containerHandler,
     }
   }}
 />

 2. 安全策略

 问题: rehype-raw 会引入 XSS 风险，尤其 CommentMarkdown 需要禁止原始 HTML。

 解决方案:
 - 默认不使用 rehype-raw
 - 只在 allowsScript=true 时才启用 rehype-raw
 - CommentMarkdown 使用 skipHtml={true} 完全禁用 HTML 解析
 - 添加 urlTransform 进行 URL sanitize

 3. Spoiler 与表格冲突

 问题: || 可能与 GFM 表格的 | 冲突。

 解决方案:
 - Spoiler tokenizer 只在 || 成对出现且不在表格行内时激活
 - 在 tokenizer 中检查 state 是否在 table context
 - 设置较低优先级，让 GFM table 先处理

 4. 脚注数据重建

 问题: 现有代码依赖 footnoteMap 和 node.alert，react-markdown 不提供。

 解决方案:
 - 使用 remark-gfm 内置的脚注支持
 - 编写 rehype 插件收集脚注定义并注入到组件 props
 - blockquote alert 通过自定义 remark 插件解析 [!NOTE] 等语法

 Step 4: 实现 remark-mention

 语法: [DisplayName]{GH@username} 或 {GH@username}

 to-hast.ts:
 export const mentionToHast: Handler = (state, node: Mention) => {
   const { prefix, name, displayName } = node
   const urlMap = {
     GH: `https://github.com/${name}`,
     TW: `https://twitter.com/${name}`,
     TG: `https://t.me/${name}`,
   }

   return {
     type: 'element',
     tagName: 'a',
     properties: {
       href: urlMap[prefix],
       className: ['mention', `mention-${prefix.toLowerCase()}`],
       'data-prefix': prefix,
       'data-name': name,
     },
     children: [{ type: 'text', value: displayName || `@${name}` }]
   }
 }

 ---
 Step 5: 实现 remark-container

 语法: ::: type {params}\ncontent\n:::

 关键点:
 - 解析 params 为 properties
 - children 递归解析为 mdast
 - 传递 containerType 和 params 到 hast

 to-hast.ts:
 export const containerToHast: Handler = (state, node: Container) => {
   return {
     type: 'element',
     tagName: 'div',
     properties: {
       className: ['markdown-container', `container-${node.containerType}`],
       'data-container-type': node.containerType,
       'data-params': node.params || '',
     },
     children: state.all(node)
   }
 }

 关键修改:

 import ReactMarkdown from 'react-markdown'
 import remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm'
 import remarkMath from 'remark-math'
 import rehypeKatex from 'rehype-katex'
 import rehypeSlug from 'rehype-slug'
 import {
   remarkSpoiler, spoilerToHast,
   remarkIns, insToHast,
   remarkMention, mentionToHast,
   remarkContainer, containerToHast,
   remarkTextMarked, textMarkedToHast,
   remarkBlockquoteAlert,
 } from '@shiro/remark'

 // components 映射 - 使用小写标签名
 const components = useMemo(() => ({
   // 标准元素
   p: MParagraph,
   table: MTable,
   thead: MTableHead,
   tbody: MTableBody,
   tr: MTableRow,
   td: MTableTd,
   th: MTableTh,
   details: MDetails,
   img: MarkdownImage,
   blockquote: MBlockQuote,

   // 自定义元素 (通过 data-* 属性区分)
   span: (props) => {
     if (props['data-type'] === 'spoiler') return <Spoiler {...props} />
     return <span {...props} />
   },

   // 链接 (mention 转换为 <a>)
   a: (props) => {
     if (props['data-prefix']) {
       return <SocialSourceLink source={props['data-prefix']} name={props['data-name']} />
     }
     return <MarkdownLink {...props} />
   },

   // Container 渲染
   div: (props) => {
     if (props['data-container-type']) {
       return <ContainerRenderer
         type={props['data-container-type']}
         params={props['data-params']}
         {...props}
       />
     }
     return <div {...props} />
   },

   // 代码块
   code: CodeRenderer,
   pre: PreRenderer,

   // 标题 (rehype-slug 自动加 id)
   h1: (props) => <MHeader level={1} {...props} />,
   h2: (props) => <MHeader level={2} {...props} />,
   // ...

   // 自定义组件 (小写)
   linkcard: LinkCard,
   gallery: Gallery,
   tabs: Tabs,
   tab: Tab,
   video: Video,
   tag: MTag,
 }), [])

 // rehype 配置
 const rehypePlugins = useMemo(() => {
   const plugins = [
     rehypeSlug, // 标题自动加 id
     rehypeKatex,
   ]
   if (allowsScript) {
     plugins.push(rehypeRaw) // 只在需要时启用
   }
   return plugins
 }, [allowsScript])

 return (
   <ReactMarkdown
     remarkPlugins={[
       remarkGfm,
       remarkMath,
       remarkSpoiler,
       remarkIns,
       remarkMention,
       remarkContainer,
       remarkTextMarked,
       remarkBlockquoteAlert,
     ]}
     rehypePlugins={rehypePlugins}
     remarkRehypeOptions={{
       handlers: {
         spoiler: spoilerToHast,
         ins: insToHast,
         mention: mentionToHast,
         container: containerToHast,
         textMarked: textMarkedToHast,
       }
     }}
     components={components}
     skipHtml={!allowsScript} // 安全：默认跳过 HTML
     urlTransform={sanitizeUrl} // URL 安全过滤
   >
     {mdContent}
   </ReactMarkdown>
 )

 Step 12: 迁移 feed/route.tsx (RSS)

 RSS 输出需要生成 HTML 字符串而非 React 组件。

 方案: 使用 unified 直接处理

 import { unified } from 'unified'
 import remarkParse from 'remark-parse'
 import remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm'
 import remarkRehype from 'remark-rehype'
 import rehypeStringify from 'rehype-stringify'
 import { remarkSpoiler, spoilerToHast, ... } from '@shiro/remark'

 const processor = unified()
   .use(remarkParse)
   .use(remarkGfm)
   .use(remarkSpoiler)
   .use(remarkMention)
   .use(remarkIns)
   .use(remarkContainer)
   .use(remarkRehype, {
     handlers: {
       spoiler: spoilerToHast,
       mention: mentionToHast,
       ins: insToHast,
       container: containerToHast,
     }
   })
   .use(rehypeStringify)

 const html = String(await processor.process(markdown))

下面是更新后的 plan 的 review（按严重级别排序，先问题后建议），重点基于现有代码结构和你的技术决策。

**Findings**
- Blocker: 仍有多处直接依赖 `markdown-to-jsx`，仅替换 `Markdown.tsx` + RSS 不够；移除依赖后会编译失败或功能缺失。现存入口：`src/components/modules/note/NoteTopicMarkdownRender.tsx`、`src/components/modules/say/SayMasonry.tsx`、`src/components/modules/comment/CommentMarkdown.tsx`、`src/app/[locale]/notes/[id]/pageExtra.tsx`、`src/app/feed/route.tsx`。需要在计划里明确迁移并改掉这些 import/RuleType 用法。
- Blocker: 你在 HAST handler 中把 `container` 转成 `<div data-params=...>`，但现有 `ContainerRule` 依赖“原始 markdown string content”做二次解析（`pickImagesFromMarkdown`, `GridMarkdownImage` 等）。用 HAST 后会丢掉原始 markdown，`ContainerRenderer` 无法复用原逻辑。需要决定：  
  - 改成从 HAST/children 中提取 img src；或  
  - 在 mdast 节点上保留 raw content（`node.raw`），并在 to-hast 时写入 `data-raw`。
- Blocker: `rehype-raw` 默认关闭会导致现有内容中的自定义 HTML 标签（`<Tabs>`, `<Tab>`, `<LinkCard>`, `<Gallery>`, `<Tag>`, `<Video>`）无法渲染；而你计划只有 `allowsScript` 才启用 `rehype-raw`，这会改变默认行为。当前 `Markdown.tsx` 默认能解析这些组件（见 `overrides`）。需要明确新默认是否允许 raw 自定义标签；否则大量内容回退。
- High: `markdown-to-jsx` 的脚注、alert blockquote、`==mark==`、`code block attrs` 等现有能力会丢失或行为改变。  
  - 你新增 `remark-text-marked`、`remark-blockquote-alert` 是对的，但还需要把 alert 信息从 mdast 传到 HAST（`data-alert`）并在组件里读取，否则 `MBlockQuote` 无法拿到 `alert`。  
  - `codeBlock` 的 `node.rawAttrs` 在 react-markdown/remark 体系里不存在，需要额外解析 attrs。
- High: RSS 渲染逻辑里有大量“只在 RSS 生效”的 override（禁用 LinkCard/Gallery/Tabs/Tab、过滤 mermaid/excalidraw/component 代码块、CDN 图片提示）目前 plan 没有迁移，会导致 RSS 输出行为变化。见 `src/app/feed/route.tsx` 的 `overrides`/`overrideRules`。
- High: 依赖列表缺少 `mdast-util-to-hast`（你用到了 `Handler`），也缺 `remark-rehype`（RSS processor 使用）。`@types/hast`/`@types/mdast` OK，但运行时包不全会直接崩。
- Medium: 你将根依赖写为 `"@shiro/remark": "workspace:*"`，但仓库没有 `pnpm-workspace.yaml`，当前 packages 用的是 `link:`（如 `@shiro/fetch`）。需要改成 `link:./packages/remark-shiroi` 或增加 workspace 配置，否则安装会失败。
- Medium: `allowedElements` 在 react-markdown 里只允许标签名，不包含 `text`；`NoteTopicMarkdownRender` 方案里 `allowedElements={['p','a','strong','em','text']}` 可能无效，需要改为 `allowedElements={['p','a','strong','em','code']}` + `unwrapDisallowed`。对应 `forceBlock` 行为也需要确认（react-markdown 没有同名选项，可能需要包一层 `<div>` 让 inline 变 block）。
- Medium: `remark-mention` 的 HAST handler 直接输出 `<a>`，而你同时在 components 里把 `a` 映射为 `MarkdownLink`。`MarkdownLink` 需要的 props 与 HAST props 不一定一致，且 `data-prefix`/`data-name` 从 `props` 读取时类型是 `string | string[] | undefined`。需要做好类型与 fallback 处理。
- Low: `rehype-slug` 自动 id 与你自定义 `slugify` 不一致，TOC/锚点可能变化。若你要保持老规则，需要自定义 slugger，或在 `rehype-slug` 之外加自定义 id 逻辑。
- Low: `spoiler` 与 GFM 表格的冲突检测在 micromark state 里不容易精确判断，`state.inTable` 这种能力要自己维护，实际实现会更复杂；这部分需要额外验证。

**Open questions / assumptions**
- 默认是否允许 raw HTML（Tabs/Tab/LinkCard/Gallery 等）？若默认禁用，你是否接受大量旧内容回退？
- Container 需要继续支持 `gallery/grid/masonry/banner` 的完整行为，还是可以部分简化？
- `MarkdownLink` 是否必须保留？如果是，`mention` 还需要输出 `<a>` 还是应改为自定义 `<span data-mention>` 并走专用 renderer？

**Change summary**
- 你的新增 HAST handler 方向正确，但需要补齐“raw HTML 兼容策略”“Container 原始内容来源”“RSS 自定义规则复刻”“依赖/包管理一致性”等关键点，否则会引入大量行为回退或构建问题。

如果你准备继续落地，我建议下一步按顺序：
1. 先明确“默认是否允许 raw HTML 自定义标签”，并在 `Markdown.tsx` 里固定策略（否则后续组件映射都不确定）。
2. 把 RSS 的特殊处理迁移到 unified pipeline（至少复刻 img/CDN、codeBlock 过滤、NotSupportRender 规则）。  
3. 再实现 container 的“图片提取/二次 markdown 解析”替代方案（HAST 遍历 or data-raw）。

**Step 2: remark-spoiler**

- `src/spoiler/syntax.ts`

- `src/spoiler/to-markdown.ts`
- `src/spoiler/to-hast.ts`
- `src/spoiler/index.ts`

MDAST 节点类型：

```ts
export interface Spoiler extends Parent {
  type: 'spoiler'
  children: PhrasingContent[]
}
```

HAST handler：

```ts
export const spoilerToHast: Handler = (state, node) => ({
  type: 'element',
  tagName: 'span',
  properties: {
    className: ['spoiler'],
    'data-type': 'spoiler',
  },
  children: state.all(node),
})
```

Tokenizer 规则：只在 `||` 成对出现且不在 table 行内（需基于 micromark state flags），优先级低于 GFM table。

```ts
  properties: {},

})
```

**Step 4: remark-mention**

**语法**：`[DisplayName]{GH@username}` / `{GH@username}`  
前缀支持 `GH/TW/TG`

MDAST 节点：

```ts
export interface Mention extends Node {
  type: 'mention'
  prefix: 'GH' | 'TW' | 'TG'
  name: string
  displayName?: string
}
```

HAST handler：输出 `<a data-prefix data-name ...>`

```ts
export const mentionToHast: Handler = (_, node: Mention) => ({
  type: 'element',
  tagName: 'a',
  properties: {
    href: urlMap[node.prefix],
    className: ['mention', `mention-${node.prefix.toLowerCase()}`],
    'data-prefix': node.prefix,
    'data-name': node.name,
  },
  children: [{ type: 'text', value: node.displayName || `@${node.name}` }],
})
```

**Step 5: remark-container**

**语法**：`::: type {params}\ncontent\n:::`  
支持：`gallery, carousel, banner, warn, error, danger, info, success, warning, note, grid, masonry`

MDAST 节点：

```ts
export interface Container extends Parent {
  type: 'container'
  containerType: string
  params?: string
  children: BlockContent[]
}
```

HAST handler：

```ts
export const containerToHast: Handler = (state, node: Container) => ({
  type: 'element',
  tagName: 'div',
  properties: {
    className: ['markdown-container', `container-${node.containerType}`],
    'data-container-type': node.containerType,
    'data-params': node.params || '',
  },
  children: state.all(node),
})
```

```ts
export const sanitizeSchema = {
  ...defaultSchema,
  tagNames: [
    ...defaultSchema.tagNames,
    'tabs',
    'tab',
    'linkcard',
    'gallery',
    'video',
    'tag',
  ],
  attributes: {
    ...defaultSchema.attributes,
    span: ['data-type', 'className'],
    a: ['href', 'title', 'data-prefix', 'data-name', 'className'],
    div: ['data-container-type', 'data-params', 'className'],
  },
}
```

**components 映射策略**：

- `p/table/thead/tbody/tr/td/th/details/img` 对应现有组件
- `span`: 如果 `data-type="spoiler"`，渲染 `<Spoiler>`
- `a`: 如果 `data-prefix`，渲染 `<SocialSourceLink>`，否则 `<MarkdownLink>`
- `div`: 如果 `data-container-type`，渲染 `<ContainerRenderer>`
- `code/pre`: 使用 `CodeBlockRender` 与 inline `code` 逻辑
- `h1..h6`: 使用 `createMarkdownHeadingComponent`（继续自定义 slug）
- 自定义标签：`linkcard`, `gallery`, `tabs`, `tab`, `video`, `tag`

**rehype pipeline**：

```
rehypePlugins = [
  rehypeKatex,
  [rehypeRaw],
  [rehypeSanitize, sanitizeSchema]
]
```

注意：raw HTML 默认允许，但只保留白名单标签/属性，其他被 sanitize 移除。

**Step 12: RSS 渲染迁移**

文件：`src/app/feed/route.tsx`

使用 unified 生成 HTML 字符串，复刻以下逻辑：

- 禁用 LinkCard/Gallery/Tabs/Tab

- 图片如果来自 CDN_HOST 输出 “不支持在 RSS 中查看” 文本

实现方式：

```ts
const processor = unified()
  .use(remarkParse)
  .use(remarkGfm)
  .use(remarkSpoiler)
  .use(remarkMention)
  .use(remarkIns)
  .use(remarkContainer)
  .use(remarkRehype, { handlers: {...}, allowDangerousHtml: false })
  .use(rehypeStringify)
```

在 `remarkRehype` 之后添加 rehype plugin 进行替换（找到 `a/img/pre` 等 tag 做 RSS 特殊处理），或者在 HAST handler 层直接输出替代节点。

```
import clsx from 'clsx'
import type { DetailedHTMLProps, FC, HTMLAttributes, ReactNode } from 'react'
import * as React from 'react'

import { BlockLinkRenderer } from './LinkRenderer'

export const MParagraph: FC<
  DetailedHTMLProps<HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>, HTMLParagraphElement>
> = (props) => {
  const { children, ...other } = props
  const { className, ...rest } = other

  if (React.Children.count(children) === 1) {
    // isImage
    const child = React.Children.toArray(children)[0]
    if (isImage(child)) {
      return children
    }

    // isLink
    if (isLink(child)) {
      const children = (child as any)?.props?.children as ReactNode[]
      return (
        <BlockLinkRenderer href={(child as any)?.props?.href}>
          {children}
        </BlockLinkRenderer>
      )
    }
  }

  return (
    <p className={clsx('paragraph', className)} {...rest}>
      {children}
    </p>
  )
}

const isImage = (child: any) => {
  if (typeof child === 'object' && (child as any)?.props?.src) {
    return true
  }
  return false
}
const isLink = (child: any) => {
  if (
    typeof child === 'object' &&
    (child as any)?.props?.href &&
    (child as any)?.props?.children?.length === 1
  ) {
    return true
  }
  return false
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
import { Divider } from '../../divider'
import { getFootNoteDomId, getFootNoteRefDomId } from '../utils/get-id'
import { redHighlight } from '../utils/redHighlight'

export const MFootNote: FC<PropsWithChildren> = (props) => (
  <div id="md-footnote" className="mt-4">
    <Divider />
    <ul className="list-[upper-roman] space-y-3 text-base text-zinc-600 dark:text-neutral-400">
      {React.Children.map(props.children, (child) => {
        if (React.isValidElement(child)) {
          const { id } = child.props as any as { id: string }
          return (
            <li id={`${getFootNoteDomId(id)}`} key={id}>
              {React.cloneElement(child as React.ReactElement<any>, {
                className: 'inline',
              })}
              <a
                href={`#${getFootNoteRefDomId(id)}`}
                onClick={(e) => {
                  e.preventDefault()
                  springScrollToElement(
                    document.getElementById(`${getFootNoteRefDomId(id)}`)!,
                    -window.innerHeight / 2,
                  )
                  redHighlight(`${getFootNoteRefDomId(id)}`)
                }}
                className="ml-2 inline-flex items-center"
              >
                <KeyboardReturnRounded />
                <span className="sr-only">
                  返回
                  {id}
                </span>
              </a>
            </li>
          )
        } else {
          return null // 或者其他处理方式
        }
      })}
    </ul>
  </div>
)
```

```
'use client'

import * as RadixTabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs'
import { m } from 'motion/react'
import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
import * as React from 'react'
import { useId, useMemo, useState } from 'react'

import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'

import { Markdown } from '../Markdown'

export const Tabs: FC<PropsWithChildren> = ({ children }) => {
  const id = useId()

  const tabs = useMemo(() => {
    const labels = [] as string[]
    for (const child of React.Children.toArray(children)) {
      if (!child) {
        continue
      }
      if (typeof child !== 'object') continue
      if (!('props' in child)) continue
      if (!('type' in child)) continue

      if (child.type !== Tab) continue
      const { label } = child.props as any as { label: string }
      labels.push(label)
    }
    return labels
  }, [children])
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<string | null>(tabs[0])
  return (
    <RadixTabs.Root value={activeTab || ''} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
      <RadixTabs.List className="flex gap-2">
        {tabs.map((tab) => (
          <RadixTabs.Trigger
            className={clsxm(
              'relative flex px-2 py-1 text-sm font-bold focus:outline-none',
              'text-zinc-600 transition-colors duration-300 dark:text-zinc-300',
            )}
            key={tab}
            value={tab}
          >
            {tab}

            {activeTab === tab && (
              <m.div
                layoutId={`tab${id}`}
                layout
                className="absolute inset-x-2 -bottom-1 h-[2px] rounded-md bg-accent"
              />
            )}
          </RadixTabs.Trigger>
        ))}
      </RadixTabs.List>

      {children}
    </RadixTabs.Root>
  )
}

export const Tab: FC<{
  label: string
  children: React.ReactNode
}> = ({ label, children }) => (
  <RadixTabs.Content
    className="animate-fade animate-duration-500"
    value={label}
  >
    <Markdown wrapper={null} removeWrapper>
      {children as string}
    </Markdown>
  </RadixTabs.Content>
)
```

```bash
cat <<'EOF' > packages/remark-shiroi/src/utils.ts
import type { PhrasingContent } from 'mdast'

type TextNode = { type: 'text'; value: string }

type ParseFn = (value: string) => PhrasingContent[] | null

const isCodeLike = (node: any) =>
  node.type === 'inlineCode' || node.type === 'code' || node.type === 'html'

const isTableLike = (node: any) =>
  node.type === 'table' || node.type === 'tableRow' || node.type === 'tableCell'

export function replaceTextNodes(
  node: any,
  parse: ParseFn,
  allowInTable = true,
  inTable = false,
): void {
  if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') return
  if (isCodeLike(node)) return

  const nextInTable = inTable || isTableLike(node)

  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    const children = node.children as any[]
    for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i += 1) {
      const child = children[i]
      if (child && child.type === 'text') {
        if (!allowInTable && nextInTable) {
          continue
        }
        const replaced = parse(child.value)
        if (replaced && replaced.length > 0) {
          children.splice(i, 1, ...replaced)
          i += replaced.length - 1
        }
      } else {
        replaceTextNodes(child, parse, allowInTable, nextInTable)
      }
    }
  }
}

export function parseDelimited(
  value: string,
  delimiter: string,
  createNode: (inner: string) => PhrasingContent,
): PhrasingContent[] | null {
  if (!value.includes(delimiter)) return null

  const nodes: PhrasingContent[] = []
  let cursor = 0
  let changed = false

  while (cursor < value.length) {
    const start = value.indexOf(delimiter, cursor)
    if (start === -1) break
    const end = value.indexOf(delimiter, start + delimiter.length)
    if (end === -1) break

    if (start > cursor) {
      nodes.push({ type: 'text', value: value.slice(cursor, start) } as TextNode)
    }

    const inner = value.slice(start + delimiter.length, end)
    if (inner.length > 0) {
      nodes.push(createNode(inner))
      changed = true
    } else {
      nodes.push({ type: 'text', value: delimiter + delimiter } as TextNode)
    }

    cursor = end + delimiter.length
  }

  if (!changed) return null

  if (cursor < value.length) {
    nodes.push({ type: 'text', value: value.slice(cursor) } as TextNode)
  }

  return nodes
}

export function parseMentions(value: string): PhrasingContent[] | null {
  const regex = /(\[(?<displayName>[^\]]+?)\])?\{(?<prefix>GH|TW|TG)@(?<name>[A-Za-z0-9_]+)\}/g
  let lastIndex = 0
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
  const nodes: PhrasingContent[] = []
  let changed = false

  while ((match = regex.exec(value)) !== null) {
    const { index } = match
    if (index > lastIndex) {
      nodes.push({ type: 'text', value: value.slice(lastIndex, index) } as TextNode)
    }

    const groups = match.groups
    if (groups) {
      nodes.push({
        type: 'mention',
        prefix: groups.prefix,
        name: groups.name,
        displayName: groups.displayName,
      } as any)
      changed = true
    } else {
      nodes.push({ type: 'text', value: match[0] } as TextNode)
    }

    lastIndex = index + match[0].length
  }

  if (!changed) return null

  if (lastIndex < value.length) {
    nodes.push({ type: 'text', value: value.slice(lastIndex) } as TextNode)
  }

  return nodes
}
EOF
```

```bash
cat <<'EOF' > packages/remark-shiroi/src/container/index.ts
import type { Plugin } from 'unified'

const allowedTypes = new Set([
  'gallery',
  'carousel',
  'banner',
  'warn',
  'error',
  'danger',
  'info',
  'success',
  'warning',
  'note',
  'grid',
  'masonry',
])

const startFence = /^:::\s*(?<type>\w+)(?:\s*\{(?<params>[^}]+)\})?\s*$/
const endFence = /^:::\s*$/

const remarkContainer: Plugin = () => {
  return (tree) => {
    transformContainers(tree)
  }
}

function transformContainers(node: any): void {
  if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') return

  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    const children = node.children as any[]
    for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i += 1) {
      const child = children[i]
      const match = matchFenceStart(child)
      if (match) {
        const { type, params } = match
        let endIndex = -1
        for (let j = i + 1; j < children.length; j += 1) {
          if (matchFenceEnd(children[j])) {
            endIndex = j
            break
          }
        }

        if (endIndex > -1) {
          const content = children.slice(i + 1, endIndex)
          const containerNode = {
            type: 'container',
            containerType: type,
            params,
            children: content,
          }
          children.splice(i, endIndex - i + 1, containerNode)
          transformContainers(containerNode)
          continue
        }
      }

      transformContainers(child)
    }
  }
}

function matchFenceStart(node: any): { type: string; params?: string } | null {
  if (!node || node.type !== 'paragraph' || !Array.isArray(node.children)) return null
  if (node.children.length !== 1) return null
  const child = node.children[0]
  if (!child || child.type !== 'text') return null

  const match = startFence.exec(child.value.trim())
  if (!match?.groups?.type) return null
  const type = match.groups.type
  if (!allowedTypes.has(type)) return null
  const params = match.groups.params
  return { type, params }
}

function matchFenceEnd(node: any): boolean {
  if (!node || node.type !== 'paragraph' || !Array.isArray(node.children)) return false
  if (node.children.length !== 1) return false
  const child = node.children[0]
  if (!child || child.type !== 'text') return false
  return endFence.test(child.value.trim())
}

export default remarkContainer
EOF
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.2-codex 2026-01-30 17:25:14Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="exec_command"><details>

```bash
cat <<'EOF' > packages/remark-shiroi/src/blockquote-alert/index.ts
import type { Plugin } from 'unified'
import { visit } from 'unist-util-visit'

const alertRegex = /^\s*\[!(?<type>\w+)\]\s*/

const remarkBlockquoteAlert: Plugin = () => {
  return (tree) => {
    visit(tree, 'blockquote', (node: any) => {
      if (!Array.isArray(node.children) || node.children.length === 0) return
      const first = node.children[0]
      if (!first || first.type !== 'paragraph' || !Array.isArray(first.children)) return
      if (first.children.length === 0) return
      const firstChild = first.children[0]
      if (!firstChild || firstChild.type !== 'text') return

      const match = alertRegex.exec(firstChild.value)
      if (!match?.groups?.type) return

      const alertType = match.groups.type.toLowerCase()
      firstChild.value = firstChild.value.replace(alertRegex, '')

      node.data = node.data || {}
      node.data.hProperties = {
        ...(node.data.hProperties || {}),
        'data-alert': alertType,
      }

      const remainingText = firstChild.value.trim()
      if (!remainingText && first.children.length === 1) {
        node.children.shift()
      }
    })
  }
}

export default remarkBlockquoteAlert
EOF
```

```bash
cat <<'EOF' > src/components/ui/markdown/utils/sanitize.ts
import { defaultSchema } from 'rehype-sanitize'

export const buildSanitizeSchema = (allowsScript: boolean) => {
  const tagNames = new Set(defaultSchema.tagNames || [])
  ;['tabs', 'tab', 'linkcard', 'gallery', 'video', 'tag'].forEach((tag) =>
    tagNames.add(tag),
  )
  if (allowsScript) {
    tagNames.add('script')
  }

  return {
    ...defaultSchema,
    tagNames: Array.from(tagNames),
    attributes: {
      ...(defaultSchema.attributes || {}),
      span: ['className', 'data-type'],
      a: ['href', 'title', 'data-prefix', 'data-name', 'className'],
      div: ['className', 'data-container-type', 'data-params'],
      mark: ['className', 'data-type'],
      input: ['type', 'checked', 'disabled'],
      code: ['className'],
      pre: ['className'],
      script: allowsScript ? ['src', 'type', 'async', 'defer'] : [],
      tabs: ['className'],
      tab: ['label', 'className'],
      linkcard: ['id', 'source', 'className'],
      gallery: ['className'],
      video: ['src', 'className'],
      tag: ['className'],
    },
  }
}

export const sanitizeUrl = (url: string) => {
  try {
    const parsed = new URL(url, 'https://example.com')
    const protocol = parsed.protocol.replace(':', '')
    if (['http', 'https', 'mailto', 'tel'].includes(protocol)) {
      return url
    }
    if (protocol === 'https' || protocol === 'http') return url
    if (!parsed.protocol || parsed.protocol === 'https:') return url
  } catch {
    if (url.startsWith('/') || url.startsWith('#')) {
      return url
    }
  }
  return ''
}
EOF
```

```bash
import type { Root, Element, Text } from 'hast'
import { visit } from 'unist-util-visit'

const isElement = (node: any): node is Element => node && node.type === 'element'

const getClassList = (node: Element) => {
  const className = node.properties?.className
  if (Array.isArray(className)) return className.map(String)
  if (typeof className === 'string') return className.split(' ')
  return []
}

const extractText = (node: any): string => {
  if (!node) return ''
  if (node.type === 'text') return (node as Text).value
  if (isElement(node)) {
    if (node.tagName === 'a') {
      const href = String(node.properties?.href || '')
      if (href.startsWith('#fnref-')) return ''
    }
    return (node.children || []).map(extractText).join('')
  }
  return ''
}

const findFootnoteOl = (section: Element): Element | null => {
  for (const child of section.children || []) {
    if (isElement(child) && child.tagName === 'ol') return child
  }
  return null
}

export const rehypeFootnoteMetadata = () => (tree: Root) => {
  const footnoteMap = new Map<string, string>()

  visit(tree, 'element', (node: Element) => {
    if (node.tagName !== 'section') return
    const classList = getClassList(node)
    if (!classList.includes('footnotes')) return

    const ol = findFootnoteOl(node)
    if (!ol) return
    ol.properties = { ...(ol.properties || {}), 'data-footnotes': 'true' }

    for (const li of ol.children || []) {
      if (!isElement(li) || li.tagName !== 'li') continue
      const id = String(li.properties?.id || '')
      if (!id.startsWith('fn-')) continue
      const key = id.replace('fn-', '')
      const text = extractText(li).trim()
      if (text) {
        footnoteMap.set(key, text)
      }
    }
  })

  visit(tree, 'element', (node: Element) => {
    if (node.tagName !== 'sup') return
    const id = String(node.properties?.id || '')
    const key = id.startsWith('fnref-') ? id.replace('fnref-', '') : ''
    if (!key) return
    const text = footnoteMap.get(key)
    if (!text) return
    node.properties = {
      ...(node.properties || {}),
      'data-footnote': text,
      'data-footnote-id': key,
    }
  })
}
```

```bash
'use client'

import './markdown.css'
import './markdown-variants.css'
import './renderers/index.css'
import 'katex/dist/katex.min.css'

import { clsx } from 'clsx'
import type { Components } from 'react-markdown'
import ReactMarkdown from 'react-markdown'
import rehypeKatex from 'rehype-katex'
import rehypeRaw from 'rehype-raw'
import rehypeSanitize from 'rehype-sanitize'
import remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm'
import remarkMath from 'remark-math'
import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
import { Fragment, memo, Suspense, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'

import {
  containerToHast,
  insToHast,
  mentionToHast,
  remarkBlockquoteAlert,
  remarkContainer,
  remarkIns,
  remarkMention,
  remarkSpoiler,
  remarkTextMarked,
  spoilerToHast,
  textMarkedToHast,
} from '@shiro/remark'

import { ErrorBoundary } from '~/components/common/ErrorBoundary'
import { CodeBlockRender } from '~/components/modules/shared/CodeBlock'
import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
import { MAIN_MARKDOWN_ID } from '~/constants/dom-id'
import { isDev } from '~/lib/env'
import { noopObj } from '~/lib/noop'
import { springScrollToElement } from '~/lib/scroller'

import { Gallery } from '../gallery'
import { MarkdownLink } from '../link/MarkdownLink'
import { LinkCard, LinkCardSource } from '../link-card'
import { SocialSourceLink } from '../rich-link/SocialSourceLink'
import { ContainerRenderer } from './renderers/container'
import {
  MParagraph,
  MTable,
  MTableBody,
  MTableHead,
  MTableRow,
  MTableTd,
  MTableTh,
} from './renderers'
import { MBlockQuote } from './renderers/blockqoute'
import { MDetails } from './renderers/collapse'
import { MFootNote } from './renderers/footnotes'
import { createMarkdownHeadingComponent } from './renderers/heading'
import { MarkdownImage } from './renderers/image'
import { Tab, Tabs } from './renderers/tabs'
import { MTag } from './renderers/tag'
import { Video } from './renderers/video'
import { getFootNoteDomId, getFootNoteRefDomId } from './utils/get-id'
import { redHighlight } from './utils/redHighlight'
import { rehypeFootnoteMetadata } from './utils/rehype-footnote'
import { buildSanitizeSchema, sanitizeUrl } from './utils/sanitize'

export type MarkdownVariant = 'post' | 'note' | 'comment'

export interface MdProps {
  value?: string

  style?: React.CSSProperties
  wrapperProps?: React.DetailedHTMLProps<
    React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    HTMLDivElement
  >
  codeBlockFully?: boolean
  className?: string
  as?: React.ElementType

  allowsScript?: boolean
  removeWrapper?: boolean
  variant?: MarkdownVariant

  components?: Components
  allowedElements?: string[]
  disallowedElements?: string[]
  unwrapDisallowed?: boolean
  skipHtml?: boolean
}

const debugValue = isDev ? '' : null

const defaultComponents: Components = {
  p: MParagraph,
  thead: MTableHead,
  tr: MTableRow,
  tbody: MTableBody,
  td: MTableTd,
  th: MTableTh,
  table: MTable,
  footer: MFootNote,
  details: MDetails,
  img: MarkdownImage,
  tag: MTag,
  tabs: Tabs as any,
  tab: Tab as any,
  video: Video as any,
  linkcard: LinkCard as any,
  gallery: Gallery as any,
}

export const Markdown: FC<
  MdProps & PropsWithChildren & Omit<React.ComponentProps<typeof ReactMarkdown>, 'children'>
> = memo((props) => {
  const {
    value,
    style,
    wrapperProps = {},
    codeBlockFully = false,
    className,

    as: As = 'div',
    allowsScript = false,
    removeWrapper = false,
    variant = 'post',

    components,
    allowedElements,
    disallowedElements,
    unwrapDisallowed,
    skipHtml,

    ...rest
  } = props

  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  const MHeader = useMemo(() => createMarkdownHeadingComponent(), [])

  const node = useMemo(() => {
    const mdContent = debugValue || value || props.children
    if (!mdContent || typeof mdContent !== 'string') return null

    const mergedComponents: Components = {
      ...defaultComponents,
      span: (spanProps) => {
        if ((spanProps as any)['data-type'] === 'spoiler') {
          return <span {...spanProps} className="spoiler" />
        }
        return <span {...spanProps} />
      },
      a: (anchorProps) => {
        const prefix = (anchorProps as any)['data-prefix'] as string | undefined
        const name = (anchorProps as any)['data-name'] as string | undefined
        if (prefix && name) {
          return (
            <SocialSourceLink
              source={prefix}
              name={(anchorProps.children as any) || name}
            />
          )
        }

        const text = getTextFromChildren(anchorProps.children)
        return (
          <MarkdownLink
            href={anchorProps.href}
            title={anchorProps.title}
            text={text}
          >
            {anchorProps.children}
          </MarkdownLink>
        )
      },
      div: (divProps) => {
        const type = (divProps as any)['data-container-type'] as string | undefined
        const params = (divProps as any)['data-params'] as string | undefined
        if (type) {
          return (
            <ContainerRenderer
              type={type}
              params={params}
              className={divProps.className}
            >
              {divProps.children}
            </ContainerRenderer>
          )
        }
        return <div {...divProps} />
      },
      blockquote: (quoteProps) => {
        const alert = (quoteProps as any)['data-alert'] as string | undefined
        return (
          <MBlockQuote alert={alert}>
            {quoteProps.children}
          </MBlockQuote>
        )
      },
      code: (codeProps) => {
        const inline = (codeProps as any).inline as boolean
        const className = codeProps.className || ''
        const match = /language-(\w+)/.exec(className || '')
        const content = String(codeProps.children || '').replace(/\n$/, '')

        if (inline) {
          return (
            <code className="rounded-md bg-zinc-200 px-2 font-mono dark:bg-neutral-800">
              {codeProps.children}
            </code>
          )
        }

        return (
          <CodeBlockRender
            content={content}
            lang={match ? match[1] : undefined}
          />
        )
      },
      input: (inputProps) => (
        <input
          {...inputProps}
          type="checkbox"
          readOnly
          className="!size-[1em]"
        />
      ),
      h1: (headingProps) => renderHeading(1, headingProps, MHeader),
      h2: (headingProps) => renderHeading(2, headingProps, MHeader),
      h3: (headingProps) => renderHeading(3, headingProps, MHeader),
      h4: (headingProps) => renderHeading(4, headingProps, MHeader),
      h5: (headingProps) => renderHeading(5, headingProps, MHeader),
      h6: (headingProps) => renderHeading(6, headingProps, MHeader),
      sup: (supProps) => {
        const footnote = (supProps as any)['data-footnote'] as string | undefined
        const id = (supProps as any)['data-footnote-id'] as string | undefined

        if (!footnote || !id) {
          return <sup {...supProps} />
        }

        return (
          <Fragment>
            <FloatPopover
              wrapperClassName="inline"
              as="span"
              triggerElement={
                <a
                  href={`${getFootNoteDomId(id)}`}
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.preventDefault()
                    const domId = getFootNoteDomId(id)
                    springScrollToElement(
                      document.getElementById(domId)!,
                      -window.innerHeight / 2,
                    )
                    redHighlight(domId)
                  }}
                >
                  <sup id={`${getFootNoteRefDomId(id)}`}>{supProps.children}</sup>
                </a>
              }
              type="tooltip"
            >
              {footnote}
            </FloatPopover>
            {maybeRenderLinkCard(footnote)}
          </Fragment>
        )
      },
      ol: (olProps) => {
        const isFootnotes = (olProps as any)['data-footnotes']
        if (isFootnotes) {
          return <MFootNote>{olProps.children}</MFootNote>
        }
        return <ol {...olProps} />
      },
      ...components,
    }

    const rehypePlugins = [
      rehypeKatex,
      ...(skipHtml ? [] : [rehypeRaw]),
      [rehypeSanitize, buildSanitizeSchema(allowsScript)],
      rehypeFootnoteMetadata,
    ]

    return (
      <ReactMarkdown
        remarkPlugins={[
          remarkGfm,
          remarkMath,
          remarkSpoiler,
          remarkIns,
          remarkMention,
          remarkContainer,
          remarkTextMarked,
          remarkBlockquoteAlert,
        ]}
        rehypePlugins={rehypePlugins as any}
        remarkRehypeOptions={{
          handlers: {
            spoiler: spoilerToHast,
            ins: insToHast,
            mention: mentionToHast,
            container: containerToHast,
            textMarked: textMarkedToHast,
          },
        }}
        components={mergedComponents}
        skipHtml={skipHtml}
        allowedElements={allowedElements}
        disallowedElements={disallowedElements}
        unwrapDisallowed={unwrapDisallowed}
        urlTransform={sanitizeUrl}
        {...rest}
      >
        {mdContent}
      </ReactMarkdown>
    )
  }, [
    value,
    props.children,
    allowsScript,
    components,
    allowedElements,
    disallowedElements,
    unwrapDisallowed,
    skipHtml,
    rest,
    MHeader,
  ])

  if (removeWrapper) return <Suspense>{node}</Suspense>

  return (
    <ErrorBoundary>
      <Suspense>
        <As
          style={style}
          {...wrapperProps}
          ref={ref}
          className={clsx(
            'markdown',
            codeBlockFully ? 'markdown--code-fully' : undefined,
            variant !== 'post' && `markdown--${variant}`,
            className,
          )}
        >
          {node}
        </As>
      </Suspense>
    </ErrorBoundary>
  )
})
Markdown.displayName = 'Markdown'

export const MainMarkdown: FC<MdProps & PropsWithChildren> = (props) => {
  const { wrapperProps = noopObj } = props
  return (
    <Markdown
      as="main"
      {...props}
      wrapperProps={useMemo(
        () => ({
          ...wrapperProps,
          id: MAIN_MARKDOWN_ID,
        }),
        [wrapperProps],
      )}
    />
  )
}

function renderHeading(
  level: number,
  props: React.ComponentProps<'h1'>,
  Component: ReturnType<typeof createMarkdownHeadingComponent>,
) {
  const text = getTextFromChildren(props.children)
  const id = props.id || slugify(text)
  return (
    <Component id={id} level={level}>
      {props.children}
    </Component>
  )
}

function getTextFromChildren(children: React.ReactNode): string {
  if (typeof children === 'string') return children
  if (Array.isArray(children)) return children.map(getTextFromChildren).join('')
  if (children && typeof children === 'object' && 'props' in children) {
    return getTextFromChildren((children as any).props?.children)
  }
  return ''
}

function maybeRenderLinkCard(footnote: string) {
  try {
    const thisUrl = new URL(footnote.replace(': ', ''))
    const isCurrentHost = thisUrl.hostname === window.location.hostname
    if (!isCurrentHost && !isDev) {
      return null
    }
    const { pathname } = thisUrl
    const linkCardId = pathname.slice(1)
    return <LinkCard id={linkCardId} source={LinkCardSource.MixSpace} />
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

// not complete, but probably good enough
function slugify(str: string) {
  return (
    str
      .replaceAll(/[ÀÁÂÃÄÅæ]/gi, 'a')
      .replaceAll(/ç/gi, 'c')
      .replaceAll(/ð/gi, 'd')
      .replaceAll(/[ÈÉÊË]/gi, 'e')
      .replaceAll(/[ÏÎÍÌ]/gi, 'i')
      .replaceAll(/Ñ/gi, 'n')
      .replaceAll(/[øœÕÔÓÒ]/gi, 'o')
      .replaceAll(/[ÜÛÚÙ]/gi, 'u')
      .replaceAll(/[ŸÝ]/gi, 'y')
      // remove non-chinese, non-latin, non-number, non-space
      .replaceAll(
        /[^\u4E00-\u9FFF\u3040-\u309F\u30A0-\u30FF\uAC00-\uD7AFa-z0-9- ]/gi,
        '',
      )
      .replaceAll(' ', '-')
      .toLowerCase()
  )
}
```

```bash
'use client'

import type { FC, ReactElement, ReactNode } from 'react'
import React from 'react'
import Masonry, { ResponsiveMasonry } from 'react-responsive-masonry'

import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
import { WrappedElementProvider } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'

import { Banner } from '../../banner/Banner'
import { Gallery } from '../../gallery/Gallery'
import { Markdown } from '../Markdown'
import { GridMarkdownImage, GridMarkdownImages, MarkdownImage } from './image'

const transformMap: Record<string, string> = {
  warning: 'warn',
  danger: 'error',
  note: 'info',
}

export const ContainerRenderer: FC<{
  type: string
  params?: string
  className?: string
  children?: ReactNode
}> = ({ type, params, className, children }) => {
  switch (type) {
    case 'carousel':
    case 'gallery': {
      const images = extractImages(children)
      return <Gallery images={images} />
    }
    case 'warn':
    case 'error':
    case 'danger':
    case 'info':
    case 'note':
    case 'success':
    case 'warning': {
      return (
        <Banner
          type={(transformMap as any)[type] || type}
          className="my-4"
        >
          <WrappedElementProvider className="w-full">
            <Markdown removeWrapper className="w-full [&>p:first-child]:mt-0">
              {children as string}
            </Markdown>
          </WrappedElementProvider>
        </Banner>
      )
    }
    case 'banner': {
      if (!params) return null
      return (
        <Banner
          type={params as 'warn' | 'error' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning'}
          className="my-4"
        >
          <WrappedElementProvider className="w-full">
            <Markdown removeWrapper className="w-full [&>p:first-child]:mt-0">
              {children as string}
            </Markdown>
          </WrappedElementProvider>
        </Banner>
      )
    }
    case 'grid': {
      const { cols, gap = 8, rows, type: gridType = 'normal' } =
        parseParams(params)

      const Grid: FC<{ children?: ReactNode; className?: string }> = ({
        children,
        className,
      }) => (
        <div
          className={clsxm('relative grid w-full', className)}
          style={{
            gridTemplateColumns: cols
              ? `repeat(${cols}, minmax(0, 1fr))`
              : undefined,
            gap: `${gap}px`,
            gridTemplateRows: rows
              ? `repeat(${rows}, minmax(0, 1fr))`
              : undefined,
          }}
        >
          {children}
        </div>
      )

      switch (gridType) {
        case 'normal': {
          const replacedChildren = replaceImages(children)
          return <Grid>{replacedChildren}</Grid>
        }
        case 'images': {
          const imagesSrc = extractImages(children).map((r) => r.url)
          return (
            <GridMarkdownImages
              height={rows && cols ? Number(rows) / Number(cols) : 1}
              imagesSrc={imagesSrc}
              Wrapper={Grid}
            />
          )
        }
        default:
          return null
      }
    }
    case 'masonry': {
      const { gap = 8 } = parseParams(params)
      const imagesSrc = extractImages(children).map((r) => r.url)

      return (
        <ResponsiveMasonry
          columnsCountBreakPoints={{
            350: 1,
            750: 2,
          }}
        >
          <Masonry gutter={`${gap}px`} className="[&_figure]:my-0">
            {imagesSrc.map((src) => (
              <GridMarkdownImage key={src} src={src} />
            ))}
          </Masonry>
        </ResponsiveMasonry>
      )
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className={className}>
      <p>{children}</p>
    </div>
  )
}

interface ParsedResult {
  cols?: string
  gap?: string
  rows?: string
  type?: string
}

function parseParams(input?: string): ParsedResult {
  if (!input) return {}
  const regex = /(\w+)=(\w+)/g
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
  const result: ParsedResult = {}

  while ((match = regex.exec(input)) !== null) {
    const key = match[1]
    const value = match[2]
    result[key as keyof ParsedResult] = value
  }

  return result
}

function extractImages(children: ReactNode) {
  const images: { url: string; name?: string; footnote?: string }[] = []

  React.Children.forEach(children, (child) => {
    if (!React.isValidElement(child)) return
    const props: any = child.props || {}
    const src = props.src
    if (src) {
      images.push({ url: src, name: props.alt, footnote: props.alt })
    }
    if (props.children) {
      images.push(...extractImages(props.children))
    }
  })

  return images
}

function replaceImages(children: ReactNode): ReactNode {
  return React.Children.map(children, (child) => {
    if (!React.isValidElement(child)) return child

    const props: any = child.props || {}
    if (props.src) {
      return <GridMarkdownImage {...props} />
    }

    if (props.children) {
      return React.cloneElement(child as ReactElement, {
        ...props,
        children: replaceImages(props.children),
      })
    }

    return child
  })
}
EOF
```

```bash
export const SayMasonry = () => {
  const { fetchNextPage, hasNextPage, data } = useSayListQuery()

      item: say,
      id: say.id,
    }))

          <Item key={item.id} item={item.item} index={index} />

          <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>

              {placeholderData.map((item) => (
                <SaySkeleton key={item.id} />
              ))}
            </Masonry>
          </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
        </LoadMoreIndicator>
      )}
    </>
  )
}

const placeholderData = Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, index) => ({
  index,
  text: '',
  id: index.toFixed(0),
  item: {} as SayModel,
}))
const SaySkeleton = memo(() => (
  <div className="relative border-l-[3px] border-l-slate-500 bg-slate-200/50 px-4 py-3 dark:bg-neutral-800">
    <div className="mb-2 h-6 w-full rounded bg-slate-300/80 dark:bg-neutral-700" />

      <div className="mb-2 h-4 w-14 rounded bg-slate-300/80 dark:bg-neutral-700 md:mb-0" />

        <div className="h-4 w-1/4 rounded bg-slate-300/80 dark:bg-neutral-700" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
))
SaySkeleton.displayName = 'SaySkeleton'

const allowedElements = ['p', 'a', 'strong', 'em', 'code', 'span', 'br']

const Item = memo<{
  item: SayModel
  index: number
}>(({ item: say, index: i }) => {
  const t = useTranslations('says')
  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
  const hasSource = !!say.source
  const hasAuthor = !!say.author
  const { dark: darkColors, light: lightColors } = useMemo(
    () => getColorScheme(stringToHue(say.id)),
    [say.id],
  )
  const isDark = useIsDark()

  const isLogged = useIsLogged()
  const present = useSayModal()

  return (
    <BottomToUpTransitionView className="w-full" delay={i * 50} key={say.id}>
      <m.blockquote
        layout
        key={say.id}
        className="group relative border-l-[3px] px-4 py-3"
        style={{
          borderLeftColor: isDark ? darkColors.accent : lightColors.accent,
          backgroundColor: addAlphaToHSL(
            isDark ? darkColors.background : lightColors.background,
            0.15,
          ),
        }}
      >
        <Markdown
          className="mb-2"
          skipHtml
          allowedElements={allowedElements}
          unwrapDisallowed
        >
          {`${say.text}`}
        </Markdown>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap text-sm text-base-content/60 md:justify-between">
          <div className="mb-2 w-full md:mb-0 md:w-auto">
            <span className="mr-2">{tCommon('published_at')}</span>
            <RelativeTime date={say.created} />
          </div>
          <div className="w-full text-right md:ml-auto md:w-auto">
            <div>
              {hasSource && `出自“${say.source}”`}
              {hasSource && hasAuthor && ', '}
              {hasAuthor && t('author_label', { author: say.author! })}
              {!hasAuthor && !hasSource && t('owner_says')}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        {isLogged && (
          <button
            onClick={() => present(say)}
            className={clsxm(
              'absolute right-0 top-0 -translate-y-1/3 translate-x-1/3 bg-base-100',
              'center flex size-6 rounded-full text-accent opacity-0 ring-1 ring-slate-200 duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 dark:ring-neutral-800',
            )}
          >
            <i className="i-mingcute-quill-pen-line" />
            <span className="sr-only">编辑</span>
          </button>
        )}
      </m.blockquote>
    </BottomToUpTransitionView>
  )
})
Item.displayName = 'Item'
EOF
```
