```bash
cat <<'EOF' > src/app/feed/route.tsx
import type { Image } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import RSS from 'rss'
import xss from 'xss'
import { unified } from 'unified'
import remarkParse from 'remark-parse'
import remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm'
import remarkRehype from 'remark-rehype'
import rehypeRaw from 'rehype-raw'
import rehypeSanitize from 'rehype-sanitize'
import rehypeStringify from 'rehype-stringify'
import type { Root, Element } from 'hast'
import { visit } from 'unist-util-visit'

import {
  containerToHast,
  insToHast,
  mentionToHast,
  remarkContainer,
  remarkIns,
  remarkMention,
  remarkSpoiler,
  spoilerToHast,
} from '@shiro/remark'

import { CDN_HOST } from '~/app.static.config'
import { buildSanitizeSchema } from '~/components/ui/markdown/utils/sanitize'
import { get } from '~/lib/lodash'
import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
export const revalidate = 60

interface RSSProps {
  title: string
  url: string
  author: string
  description: string
  data: {
    created: Date | null
    modified: Date | null
    link: string
    title: string
    text: string
    id: string
    images: Image[]
  }[]
}

export async function GET() {
  const ReactDOM = (await import('react-dom/server')).default

  const [{ author, data, url }, agg] = await Promise.all([
    apiClient.aggregate.proxy.feed.get<RSSProps>(),
    apiClient.aggregate.getAggregateData<AppThemeConfig>('shiro'),
  ])

  const { title, description } = agg.seo

  const now = new Date()
  const custom_elements = get(
    agg.$raw.theme as AppConfig,
    'config.module.rss.custom_elements',
  )
  const noRSS = get(agg.$raw.theme as AppConfig, 'config.module.rss.noRSS')

  const followChallengeIndex = custom_elements
    ? custom_elements.findIndex((item: any) => item.follow_challenge)
    : -1
  if (-~followChallengeIndex) {
    const map = {} as Record<string, string>

    const { follow_challenge } = custom_elements[followChallengeIndex]
    for (const item of follow_challenge) {
      Object.assign(map, item)
    }

    custom_elements[followChallengeIndex].follow_challenge = [
      {
        feedId: map.feed_id,
      },
      {
        userId: map.user_id,
      },
    ]
  }

  const imageUrl = agg.theme?.config?.site?.favicon.startsWith('/')
    ? `${url}${agg.theme?.config?.site?.favicon}`
    : agg.theme?.config?.site?.favicon

  const feed = new RSS({
    title,
    description,
    site_url: url,
    feed_url: `${url}/feed`,
    language: 'zh-CN',
    image_url: imageUrl,
    generator: 'Shiro (https://github.com/Innei/Shiro)',
    pubDate: now.toUTCString(),

    custom_elements,
  })

  const processor = createRssProcessor()

  for (const item of data) {
    const render = async () => {
      if (noRSS) {
        return ReactDOM.renderToString(
          <p>
            前往原站查看：
            <a href={`${xss(item.link)}`}>{xss(item.link)}</a>
          </p>,
        )
      }
      try {
        const html = String(await processor.process(item.text))
        return ReactDOM.renderToString(
          <div>
            <blockquote>
              该渲染由 Shiro API 生成，可能存在排版问题，最佳体验请前往：
              <a href={`${xss(item.link)}`}>{xss(item.link)}</a>
            </blockquote>
            <div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: html }} />
            <p
              style={{
                textAlign: 'right',
              }}
            >
              <a href={`${`${xss(item.link)}#comments`}`}>
                看完了？说点什么呢
              </a>
            </p>
          </div>,
        )
      } catch {
        return ReactDOM.renderToString(
          <p>
            当前内容无法在 RSS 阅读器中正确渲染，请前往：
            <a href={`${xss(item.link)}`}>{xss(item.link)}</a>
          </p>,
        )
      }
    }

    feed.item({
      author,
      title: item.title,
      url: item.link,
      date: item.created!,
      description: await render(),
    })
  }

  return new Response(`${feed.xml()}`, {
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/xml',
      'Cache-Control': `max-age=60, s-maxage=${revalidate}`,
      'CDN-Cache-Control': `max-age=${revalidate}`,
      'Cloudflare-CDN-Cache-Control': `max-age=${revalidate}`,
      'Vercel-CDN-Cache-Control': `max-age=${revalidate}`,
    },
  })
}

function createRssProcessor() {
  return unified()
    .use(remarkParse)
    .use(remarkGfm)
    .use(remarkSpoiler)
    .use(remarkMention)
    .use(remarkIns)
    .use(remarkContainer)
    .use(remarkRehype, {
      handlers: {
        spoiler: spoilerToHast,
        mention: mentionToHast,
        ins: insToHast,
        container: containerToHast,
      },
      allowDangerousHtml: true,
    })
    .use(rehypeRaw)
    .use(rehypeSanitize, buildSanitizeSchema(false))
    .use(rehypeRssTransform)
    .use(rehypeStringify)
}

const notSupportElement = (): Element => ({
  type: 'element',
  tagName: 'p',
  properties: {
    style:
      'padding:6px 12px;border-left:2px solid #33A6B8;background:#33A6B850;font-style:italic;font-weight:500;',
  },
  children: [
    {
      type: 'text',
      value: 'Not support render this content in RSS render',
    },
  ],
})

const rehypeRssTransform = () => (tree: Root) => {
  visit(tree, 'element', (node: Element, index, parent) => {
    if (!parent || typeof index !== 'number') return

    if (
      ['linkcard', 'gallery', 'tabs', 'tab'].includes(node.tagName) ||
      (node.tagName === 'div' &&
        typeof node.properties?.['data-container-type'] === 'string')
    ) {
      parent.children[index] = notSupportElement()
      return
    }

    if (node.tagName === 'img') {
      const src = String(node.properties?.src || '')
      try {
        if (src && new URL(src).hostname === CDN_HOST) {
          parent.children[index] = {
            type: 'element',
            tagName: 'span',
            properties: {},
            children: [{ type: 'text', value: '此图片不支持在 RSS Render 中查看。' }],
          }
        }
      } catch {
        return
      }
      return
    }

    if (node.tagName === 'pre') {
      const code = node.children?.[0]
      if (!code || (code as any).tagName !== 'code') return
      const className = (code as any).properties?.className
      const classes = Array.isArray(className) ? className : [className]
      const langClass = classes.find((c) => typeof c === 'string' && c.startsWith('language-'))
      const lang = langClass ? langClass.replace('language-', '') : ''
      if (['mermaid', 'excalidraw', 'component'].includes(lang)) {
        parent.children[index] = notSupportElement()
      }
    }
  })
}
EOF
```

```
import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'

const renderTitle = (text: string) => (
  <h1 className="!my-12 !text-xl font-bold">{text}</h1>
)

export default function Page() {
  const t = useTranslations('friends')
  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['friends'],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const { data } = await apiClient.link.getAll()
      return data
    },
    select: useCallback((data: LinkModel[]) => {
      const friends: LinkModel[] = []
      const collections: LinkModel[] = []
      const outdated: LinkModel[] = []
      const banned: LinkModel[] = []

      for (const link of data) {
        if (link.hide) {
          continue
        }

        switch (link.state) {
          case LinkState.Banned: {
            banned.push(link)
            continue
          }
          case LinkState.Outdate: {
            outdated.push(link)
            continue
          }
        }

        switch (link.type) {
          case LinkType.Friend: {
            friends.push(link)
            break
          }
          case LinkType.Collection: {
            collections.push(link)
          }
        }
      }

      return { friends: shuffle(friends), collections, outdated, banned }
    }, []),
  })

  if (isLoading) return <FullPageLoading />
  if (!data) return null
  const { banned, collections, friends, outdated } = data
  return (
    <div>
      <header className="prose prose-p:my-2">
        <h1>{t('page_title')}</h1>
        <h3>{t('page_subtitle')}</h3>
      </header>

      <main className="mt-10 flex w-full flex-col">
        {friends.length > 0 && (
          <>
            {collections.length > 0 && renderTitle(t('section_friends'))}
            <FriendSection data={friends} />
          </>
        )}
        {collections.length > 0 && (
          <>
            {friends.length > 0 && renderTitle(t('section_collections'))}
            <FavoriteSection data={collections} />
          </>
        )}

        {outdated.length > 0 && (
          <>
            <Collapse
              title={
                <div className="mt-8 font-bold">{t('section_outdated')}</div>
              }
            >
              <OutdateSection data={outdated} />
            </Collapse>
          </>
        )}
        {banned.length > 0 && (
          <>
            <Collapse
              title={
                <div className="mt-8 font-bold">{t('section_banned')}</div>
              }
            >
              <BannedSection data={banned} />
            </Collapse>
          </>
        )}
      </main>

      <ApplyLinkInfo />
      <BackToTopFAB />
    </div>
  )
}
```

```
'use client'
import clsx from 'clsx'
import Image from 'next/image'
import type { FC } from 'react'
import { memo, useRef } from 'react'
import { Blurhash } from 'react-blurhash'
import { PhotoProvider, PhotoView } from 'react-photo-view'

import { LazyLoad } from '~/components/common/Lazyload'
import { addImageUrlResizeQuery } from '~/lib/image'
import { isVideoExt } from '~/lib/mine-type'
import { useMarkdownImageRecord } from '~/providers/article/MarkdownImageRecordProvider'
import {
  useWrappedElementSize,
  WrappedElementProvider,
} from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'

import { Divider } from '../../divider/Divider'
import { FixedZoomedImage } from '../../image/ZoomedImage'
import { Video } from './video'

export const MarkdownImage = (props: { src: string; alt?: string }) => {
  const { src, alt } = props
  const nextProps = {
    ...props,
  }
  nextProps.alt = alt?.replace(/^[¡!]/, '')
  const { w } = useWrappedElementSize()

  const ext = src.split('.').pop()!
  const mediaInfo = useMarkdownImageRecord(src)

  if (isVideoExt(ext)) {
    const figcaption = alt?.replace(/^[¡!]/, '')
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
        <Video
          src={src}
          className={mediaInfo && 'fit'}
          style={
            {
              '--video-height': mediaInfo?.height,
              '--video-width': mediaInfo?.width,
            } as any
          }
          playsInline
          autoPlay={false}
        />

        {figcaption && (
          <p className="mt-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-sm">
            <Divider className="w-[80px] opacity-80" />
            <span className="opacity-90">{figcaption}</span>
          </p>
        )}
      </div>
    )
  }

  return <FixedZoomedImage {...nextProps} containerWidth={w} />
}

export const GridMarkdownImage = (props: any) => (
  <WrappedElementProvider>
    <div className="relative flex min-w-0 grow">
      <MarkdownImage {...props} />
    </div>
  </WrappedElementProvider>
)

export const GridMarkdownImages: FC<{
  imagesSrc: string[]
  Wrapper: Component
  height: number
}> = ({ imagesSrc, Wrapper, height = 1 }) => (
  <div
    className="relative"
    style={{
      paddingBottom: `${height * 100}%`,
    }}
  >
    <PhotoProvider photoClosable>
      <Wrapper className="absolute inset-0">
        {imagesSrc.map((src) => (
          <GridZoomImage key={src} src={src} />
        ))}
      </Wrapper>
    </PhotoProvider>
  </div>
)

const GridZoomImage: FC<{ src: string }> = memo(({ src }) => {
  const { accent, height, width, blurHash } = useMarkdownImageRecord(src) || {}
  const cropUrl = addImageUrlResizeQuery(src, 600)
  const imageEl = useRef<HTMLImageElement>(null)
  const wGreaterThanH = width && height ? width > height : true

  const ImageComponent = height && width ? Image : 'img'

  return (
    <div
      className="center relative flex size-full overflow-hidden rounded-md bg-cover bg-center"
      style={{
        backgroundColor: accent,
      }}
    >
      {!!blurHash && (
        <Blurhash
          hash={blurHash}
          resolutionX={32}
          resolutionY={32}
          className="!size-full"
        />
      )}
      <LazyLoad offset={30}>
        <PhotoView src={src}>
          <ImageComponent
            loading="lazy"
            alt=""
            height={height}
```

```
import type { FC } from 'react'

import { Favicon } from './Favicon'

const prefixToUrlMap = {
  GH: 'https://github.com/',
  TW: 'https://twitter.com/',
  TG: 'https://t.me/',
  ZH: 'https://www.zhihu.com/people/',
}

export const SocialSourceLink: FC<{
  source: string
  name: React.ReactNode
  href?: string
}> = ({ name, source, href }) => {
  // @ts-ignore
  const urlPrefix = prefixToUrlMap[source]

  if (!urlPrefix) return null

  return (
    <span className="mx-1 space-x-1 align-text-bottom">
      <Favicon source={source} />
      <a
        target="_blank"
        rel="noreferrer nofollow inline"
        href={href ?? `${urlPrefix}${name}`}
        className="underline-offset-2"
      >
        {name}
      </a>
    </span>
  )
}
```

Implemented the migration plan end‑to‑end: added `@shiro/remark`, rewrote markdown rendering around `react-markdown`, added sanitize + footnote metadata, reworked container rendering, migrated RSS pipeline, and removed `markdown-to-jsx` usages.

Key changes
- New package `packages/remark-shiroi` with spoiler/ins/mention/container/text-marked/blockquote-alert plugins + HAST handlers.
- Rewrote `src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx` to use `react-markdown`, `remark-*`, `rehype-*`, custom handlers, sanitize, and footnote metadata.
- Added `ContainerRenderer` to fully support gallery/grid/masonry/banner based on HAST children.
- Updated all markdown entrypoints (comments, notes, say list, friends page, RSS).
- Removed old markdown-to-jsx parsers and utils.

Files touched (highlights)
- New: `packages/remark-shiroi/**`
- New: `src/components/ui/markdown/utils/sanitize.ts`
- New: `src/components/ui/markdown/utils/rehype-footnote.ts`
- New: `src/components/ui/markdown/renderers/container.tsx`

- Deleted: `src/components/ui/markdown/parsers/**`
- Deleted: `src/components/ui/markdown/utils/parser.ts`
- `package.json` dependency updates

Notes
- Raw HTML is allowed by default but sanitized; script tags only allowed when `allowsScript=true`.
- Footnotes are rebuilt via `rehypeFootnoteMetadata`, with tooltip rendering restored.
- Container rendering uses HAST traversal for image extraction, not raw markdown strings.

2) Run `pnpm dev` and spot-check: spoilers, mentions, containers, footnotes, RSS.

```bash
import type { Plugin } from 'unified'

const allowedTypes = new Set([
  'gallery',
  'carousel',
  'banner',
  'warn',
  'error',
  'danger',
  'info',
  'success',
  'warning',
  'note',
  'grid',
  'masonry',
])

const startFence = /^:::\s*(?<type>\w+)(?:\s*\{(?<params>[^}]+)\})?\s*$/
const endFence = /^:::\s*$/

const remarkContainer: Plugin = () => {
  return (tree) => {
    transformContainers(tree)
  }
}

function transformContainers(node: any): void {
  if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') return

  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    const children = node.children as any[]
    for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i += 1) {
      const child = children[i]
      const match = matchFenceStart(child)
      if (match) {
        const { type, params } = match
        let endIndex = -1
        let trailingText: string | null = null
        let content: any[] | null = null

        const inlineResult = extractInlineContainer(child, type)
        if (inlineResult) {
          endIndex = i
          trailingText = inlineResult.trailingText
          content = inlineResult.content
        } else {
          for (let j = i + 1; j < children.length; j += 1) {
            if (matchFenceEnd(children[j])) {
              endIndex = j
              break
            }
          }
        }

        if (endIndex > -1) {
          const containerNode = {
            type: 'container',
            containerType: type,
            params,
            children: content ?? children.slice(i + 1, endIndex),
          }

          const replaceCount = endIndex - i + 1
          const insertNodes = [containerNode]
          if (trailingText && trailingText.trim()) {
            insertNodes.push({
              type: 'paragraph',
              children: [{ type: 'text', value: trailingText }],
            })
          }

          children.splice(i, replaceCount, ...insertNodes)
          transformContainers(containerNode)
          continue
        }
      }

      transformContainers(child)
    }
  }
}

function matchFenceStart(node: any): { type: string; params?: string } | null {
  const text = getFenceText(node)
  if (!text) return null

  const match = startFence.exec(text.trim())
  if (!match?.groups?.type) return null
  const { type } = match.groups
  if (!allowedTypes.has(type)) return null
  const { params } = match.groups
  return { type, params }
}

function matchFenceEnd(node: any): boolean {
  const text = getFenceText(node)
  if (!text) return false
  return endFence.test(text.trim())
}

function getFenceText(node: any): string | null {
  if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') return null
  if (node.type === 'html' && typeof node.value === 'string') return node.value
  if (node.type === 'text' && typeof node.value === 'string') return node.value

  if (node.type !== 'paragraph' || !Array.isArray(node.children)) return null
  let text = ''
  for (const child of node.children) {
    if (!child || child.type !== 'text') return null
    text += child.value
  }
  return text
}

function extractInlineContainer(
  node: any,
  type: string,
): { content: any[]; trailingText: string | null } | null {
  if (!node || node.type !== 'paragraph' || !Array.isArray(node.children)) return null
  const children = node.children as any[]
  if (children.length < 2) return null
  const first = children[0]
  if (!first || first.type !== 'text') return null

  const startMatch = startFence.exec(first.value.trim())
  if (!startMatch?.groups?.type || startMatch.groups.type !== type) return null

  const last = children[children.length - 1]
  if (!last || last.type !== 'text') return null
  const lastValue = last.value
  if (!lastValue.includes(':::')) return null

  const endIndex = lastValue.indexOf(':::')
  const trailingText = lastValue.slice(endIndex + 3)
  last.value = lastValue.slice(0, endIndex)
  return { content: children.slice(1), trailingText }
}

export default remarkContainer
```

```bash
cat <<'EOF' > /tmp/remark-container.ts
import type { Plugin } from 'unified'

const allowedTypes = new Set([
  'gallery',
  'carousel',
  'banner',
  'warn',
  'error',
  'danger',
  'info',
  'success',
  'warning',
  'note',
  'grid',
  'masonry',
])

const startFence = /^:::\s*(?<type>\w+)(?:\s*\{(?<params>[^}]+)\})?\s*$/
const endFence = /^:::\s*$/

const remarkContainer: Plugin = () => {
  return (tree) => {
    transformContainers(tree)
  }
}

function transformContainers(node: any): void {
  if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') return

  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    const children = node.children as any[]
    for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i += 1) {
      const child = children[i]
      const match = matchFenceStart(child)
      if (match) {
        const { type, params, inlineContent } = match
        let endIndex = -1
        let trailingText: string | null = null
        let content: any[] = []

        // Same-paragraph inline container
        const inlineResult = extractInlineContainer(child, type)
        if (inlineResult) {
          endIndex = i
          trailingText = inlineResult.trailingText
          content = inlineResult.content
        } else {
          for (let j = i + 1; j < children.length; j += 1) {
            const endMatch = matchFenceEnd(children[j])
            if (endMatch) {
              endIndex = j
              trailingText = endMatch.trailingText
              break
            }
          }
        }

        if (endIndex > -1) {
          content = inlineResult
            ? content
            : [...(inlineContent || []), ...children.slice(i + 1, endIndex)]

          const containerNode = {
            type: 'container',
            containerType: type,
            params,
            children: content,
          }

          const replaceCount = endIndex - i + 1
          const insertNodes = [containerNode]
          if (trailingText && trailingText.trim()) {
            insertNodes.push({
              type: 'paragraph',
              children: [{ type: 'text', value: trailingText }],
            })
          }

          children.splice(i, replaceCount, ...insertNodes)
          transformContainers(containerNode)
          continue
        }
      }

      transformContainers(child)
    }
  }
}

function matchFenceStart(
  node: any,
): { type: string; params?: string; inlineContent?: any[] } | null {
  const text = getFenceText(node)
  if (text) {
    const match = startFence.exec(text.trim())
    if (!match?.groups?.type) return null
    const { type } = match.groups
    if (!allowedTypes.has(type)) return null
    const { params } = match.groups
    return { type, params }
  }

  // Paragraph with mixed children: fence in first text, followed by content
  if (node?.type === 'paragraph' && Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    const [first, ...rest] = node.children
    if (!first || first.type !== 'text') return null
    const match = startFence.exec(first.value.trim())
    if (!match?.groups?.type) return null
    const { type } = match.groups
    if (!allowedTypes.has(type)) return null
    const { params } = match.groups

    // Remove fence text from first node
    first.value = ''
    const inlineContent = [
      ...(first.value ? [first] : []),
      ...rest,
    ].filter(Boolean)

    return { type, params, inlineContent }
  }

  return null
}

function matchFenceEnd(
  node: any,
): { trailingText: string | null } | null {
  const text = getFenceText(node)
  if (text) {
    if (endFence.test(text.trim())) return { trailingText: null }
    return null
  }

  // Paragraph with mixed children: end fence in first text
  if (node?.type === 'paragraph' && Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    const first = node.children[0]
    if (!first || first.type !== 'text') return null
    const value = first.value
    const index = value.indexOf(':::')
    if (index === -1) return null
    const before = value.slice(0, index).trim()
    if (before.length !== 0) return null
    const trailingText = value.slice(index + 3)
    return { trailingText }
  }

  return null
}

function getFenceText(node: any): string | null {
  if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') return null
  if (node.type === 'html' && typeof node.value === 'string') return node.value
  if (node.type === 'text' && typeof node.value === 'string') return node.value

  if (node.type !== 'paragraph' || !Array.isArray(node.children)) return null
  let text = ''
  for (const child of node.children) {
    if (!child || child.type !== 'text') return null
    text += child.value
  }
  return text
}

function extractInlineContainer(
  node: any,
  type: string,
): { content: any[]; trailingText: string | null } | null {
  if (!node || node.type !== 'paragraph' || !Array.isArray(node.children)) return null
  const children = node.children as any[]
  if (children.length < 2) return null
  const first = children[0]
  if (!first || first.type !== 'text') return null

  const startMatch = startFence.exec(first.value.trim())
  if (!startMatch?.groups?.type || startMatch.groups.type !== type) return null

  const last = children[children.length - 1]
  if (!last || last.type !== 'text') return null
  const lastValue = last.value
  if (!lastValue.includes(':::')) return null

  const endIndex = lastValue.indexOf(':::')
  const trailingText = lastValue.slice(endIndex + 3)
  last.value = lastValue.slice(0, endIndex)
  return { content: children.slice(1), trailingText }
}

export default remarkContainer
```

```bash
function transformContainers(node: any): void {
  if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') return
```
